name: My workers comp lawyer wants 20% of settlement—is that normal?
description: Yes, standard contingency fee. No upfront cost. They only get paid if you win. Negotiate if settlement is large.

mainEntity.name: My workers comp lawyer wants 20% of settlement—is that normal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, standard contingency fee. No upfront cost. They only get paid if you win. Negotiate if settlement is large.
